the phase we're in

Juneclosed chapter
Julynew chapter

July Phase.

No pressure. No expectations. No complicated labels.
Just two engineering students trying to survive another year.

📓 first page, third year —

new semester, same chaos, hopefully better time management (unlikely).

goal: build cool things, sleep occasionally, cheer each other on.

🎫

a small note before we start

Hey Khushvi 🌼

Welcome to Year Three. I thought semester beginnings deserved something a little more fun than a text message — so I built you this instead. Scroll whenever you're ready.

01 — the desk

Everything on your desk means something

Click around. Every object has something to say.

02 — the backpack

Pack light. Pack right.

Here's what's worth carrying into this semester.

🎒

03 — the bloom

Growth doesn't happen overnight.

Look at the little flower in the corner — it's been growing this whole time, one scroll at a time. Look how far you've already come.

04 — the tracker

Achievement Tracker

The year, one square at a time. Hover across it.

hover any square →

05 — the mission

MISSION 2026–2027 · IN PROGRESS

Objectives

06 — system check

Engineering Console

07 — today's fortune

Draw one for today

tap to draw
🌼

08 — the jar

The Encouragement Jar

100 tiny notes. Pull one whenever you need it.

🫙

09 — mail from the future

A letter arrived

✉
✉️
Hi.
I'm you. A few years older.

You worried far more than you needed to.
You doubted yourself more than anyone else ever did.

Yet somehow... you figured things out.
Not perfectly. Not immediately. But enough.

Keep going. You'll become someone you're proud of. — Future You 🌼

10 — the career galaxy

Every star is a version of you

Click a star.

✦ 🌼 ⚙️ ✎ ☆

11 — the memory gallery

Little moments, kept

Not a love letter, just a scrapbook. Hover to lift one, click to open it.

12 — the pact

Semester Pact

Check each one, then sign at the bottom.

    ACCEPTED
    🌙

    a last thing, before you go

    Khushvi,

    I don't know what this year will bring. But I hope that whenever things become overwhelming, you remember how capable you truly are.

    I genuinely believe you'll build amazing things, learn incredible skills, and become an engineer you'll be proud of.

    Here's to your Third Year. Here's to my Fourth Year.
    Here's to projects, internships, late-night debugging, bad quizzes, good memories, small victories, and dreams worth chasing.

    Let's make this academic year unforgettable.
    Happy New Semester 🌼

    See you in college.
    P.S. Don't skip lunch before lab. 😤🌼
    built in July, for July · with quiet belief 🌼
